title: Test proposal: create third blank file in src/
summary: Create a third empty placeholder file under src/ to validate proposal approval flow.
details: When approved, create an empty file at `src/test-proposal-blank-file-3.txt` with no content. This is a no-op style filesystem change used only to validate the proposal/approval pipeline.

affectedFiles.description: Blank placeholder file for proposal flow test

estimatedImpact: No runtime impact; validates proposal workflow end-to-end.
executorPrompt: Create a new empty file at src/test-proposal-blank-file-3.txt. Do not modify any other files. Report completion.
